calendar.matters:
Petition For A Declarztion That Marva Taylor Has The Right To Immediate Possession Of Real Property Under The Terms Of The Trust Instrument
Off Calendar Jan-13-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Martin Malkin for Petitioner. Brian McCaffrey for Charles Eden (Respondent).

The Parties presented oral argument to support their positions. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.

Petition For A Declarztion That Marva Taylor Has The Right To Immediate Possession Of Real Property Under The Terms Of The Trust Instrument
Off Calendar Dec-09-2008 Continued To Dec-16-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For A Declarztion That Marva Taylor Has The Right To Immediate Possession Of Real Property Under The Terms Of The Trust Instrument
Off Calendar Nov-18-2008 Continued To Dec-09-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For A Declaration That An Action To Determine The Right Of The Beneficiary Under The Trust Is Not A Contest
Off Calendar Jul-07-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Martin Malkin for the Petitioner. Brian McCaffrey for Charles Eden (Respondent).

The Court stated that the tenative was that petition was not a violation of the trust language and that it was not a contest. The parties presented oral arguement to support their positions. After hearing oral argument, the Court ruled that the petition was not a contest. The Court will sign the order granting the petition upon further review.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.

Petition For A Declararion That An Action Against Respondent To Recover Possession Of Trust Real Property Is Not A Contest.
Off Calendar Mar-05-2008 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Martin Malkin for the Petitioner. Brian McCaffrey for Charles Eden (Respondent).

After hearing oral argument presented by Counsel, the court denied the petition without prejudice.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.

Petition For A Declararion That An Action Against Respondent To Recover Possession Of Trust Real Property Is Not A Contest.
Off Calendar Feb-20-2008 Continued To Mar-05-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
